serverInfo.name: agent-replay-mcp
serverInfo.description: Agent session recording and replay — debug non-deterministic agent behavior with session comparison and divergence detection
serverInfo.author: THRONE AI

tools.name: record_session
tools.description: Start recording all actions for an agent session

tools.name: stop_recording
tools.description: Stop recording and return session summary with action breakdown

tools.name: log_action
tools.description: Log a single action with input, output, reasoning, and timing

tools.name: replay_session
tools.description: Replay a recorded session step by step with full action detail

tools.name: compare_sessions
tools.description: Behavioral diff between two sessions with step-by-step alignment

tools.name: find_divergence_point
tools.description: Find where an agent first deviated from expected output

tools.name: export_session
tools.description: Export session as JSON or markdown transcript

resources.description: List all recorded sessions with status and action counts

pricing.pro: $99/month — persistent storage, session search, webhook alerts
